case_title: JONES, CARY VS BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING (BELLACH, JEROME)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY JONES, CARY AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING (BELLACH, JEROME) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING (BELLACH, JEROME)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, CARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING (BELLACH, JEROME) $1,179.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,231.00, CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT FOR PURCHASE OF POWER RECLINER RESCINDED. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT THE BALANCE OF $1179.00 FOR THE BALANCE OF THE MONEY OWED FOR THE 3-SEATER SOFA ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT RE: COMPLIANCE W/COURT ORDER FILED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-02-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-09-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTRACT BETWEEN PLTF & DEFT FOR PURCHASE OF POWER RECLINER RESCINDED. PLTF TO PAY DEFT THE BALANCE OF THE MONEY OWED FOR THE 3-SEATER SOFA ONLY. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-2004, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO SEP-02-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 OUT OF STATE ON AUG. 30.
